_note: ACS 5-Year 2023 Muslim community proxy — approved country list for proxy_born column in zip_demographics. Excluded: Iran (large secular diaspora), Lebanon (large Maronite Christian community), India (mixed Hindu/Muslim/Sikh), Israel.

birthplace_vars.flag_reason: Chaldean Catholic and Assyrian Christian community — overcounts Muslim proxy
Syrian Christian and Alawi minority — overcounts Muslim proxy

birthplace_vars.country: Other Western Asia (Bahrain, Qatar, Oman, West Bank/Gaza)

birthplace_vars.flag_reason: Coptic Orthodox community (est. 10% of Egyptian diaspora) — overcounts Muslim proxy

language_vars.language: Arabic (all speakers, English proficiency level not filtered)
language_vars.note: C16001 is the only language table available at the ZCTA level in ACS 5-Year. B16001 (which includes Urdu, Bengali, Somali separately) is only available at tract and county geography.

language_note: Urdu, Bengali, and Somali are NOT separately listed in C16001 at ZCTA level. They are collapsed into 'Other Indo-European' and 'Other and unspecified' groups. The language proxy is therefore Arabic-only. South Asian Muslims (Pakistani, Bangladeshi) are captured by the birthplace proxy instead.

excluded_birthplace.reason: User decision: diaspora composition makes it more noise than signal (large secular/non-Muslim share in DFW)
User decision: diaspora composition makes it more noise than signal (large Maronite Christian community in DFW)
